name: Pascia
description:
__Debut:__ Chapter 501, Episode 394
__Origin:__ South Blue

Pascia was a female dancer sold at the Auction House. She was no. 15 on the list and rated as the world's most beautiful slave girl, a 20 year old dancer of excellent "proportions". Sanji asked Nami if they could buy her as well, which Nami was not happy about it and responds by hitting him. Pascia is seen again when Franky throws the keys to the other slaves in the Auction House.  Pascia's starting bid was 800.000 belli and she was sold for 7.200.000 belli.
